BRING ME EVERYTHING YOU KNOW ABOUT CASSIAH'S PERSONALITY AND POSSIBLE NATURE AND MY LIFE IS ALL YOURS
If possible you can disregard main story plot relevance but focus on the personality smh thank you

Ohohohoho… on it!~
Notably her lack of ability to feel or understand emotion isn’t something that appeared one day or happened when she was an awakener; she was born with it! Although no one ever explained it to her and she was always confused and curious why people reacted the way they did. Eventually the troupe she was raised in was killed one by one, and eventually she too died from a poison wine glass the same as the rest of her troupe (I’m 90% sure this is N but I can’t factually prove it so ignore my rambling cause I’ll focus on the facts and not theory crafting) Her desire to understand emotions came back with a bang when she was awakened, as she now had the ability to steal emotions from people. Now she goes around as an awakener for hire or a magician performing shows as a front to steal emotions. Oh, another thing. Casiah isn’t good at coming up with magic herself, but she’s perfect at imitating anything she sees letting her master other peoples tricks quickly. As I mentioned another time, when she takes emotions people lose them permanently and feel a little more empty or dull and unsatisfied with life. If she takes all of someone’s emotions they lose the ability to even think supposedly. When she’s taking from Awakeners though they require her to steal emotions around 300~ times for that to occur. All the emotions you see her express are copied from other people from what she’s learnt that “this is where this emotion should be expressed” but as it is she doesn’t feel any of them herself, resulting in her constant smug nature.

The closest thing I’d say to her feeling an emotion is where she genuinely blushes in her frenzy, although that’s likely the influence of the holy river like all frenzies and she wouldn’t be able to otherwise.
Oh yeah and she throws kids into dimensions when she’s bored I guess. I hope one day she’ll steal enough emotions to properly understand them, even if she can’t feel her own. 
Oh also her hat is a private pocket dimension but she can also just throw people into random dimensions. It’s not explained how she steals emotions but her voicelines have her being caught in the act, implying it’s either a notable action that she sneaks or hides in her performances, or keeper just assumes anytime she’s sitting near someone she’s stealing their emotions.
It’s 2am and im sleep deprived so I might’ve missed a few things, or made some mistakes but that shouuuuld be the gist of it! <@1141174040531316737>
